svg.title: Arm D graph (cumulative)
svg.desc: Arm C graph (SNP backbone, pathways, KO bridge, isolate-pathway edges) extended with drug nodes anchored to target pathways and target gene SNPs.
svg.text: Arm D: drug extension (cumulative on Arm C)
Carries all Arm C edges; adds drug nodes with drug–pathway and drug–gene anchors
Dashed isolate–pathway edges (Arm B) and KO bridge (Arm C) carry over.
